trigger: Merchant dials 1800-XXX-XXXX OR outbound call placed
properties: merchant_id:string, phone_number_hash:string, timestamp:iso8601, call_type:enum[inbound|outbound], outbound_trigger_id:string|null, city:string
why_track: Volume tracking + inbound vs outbound split

trigger: KYC lookup returns merchant profile successfully
properties: merchant_id:string, merchant_name:string, city:string, credit_limit:integer, credit_available:integer, wallet_balance:integer, account_status:enum[active|suspended|guest], kyc_lookup_latency_ms:integer, has_prior_bookings:boolean
why_track: Auth success rate + KYC health monitoring

trigger: KYC lookup returns null or suspended status
First merchant utterance processed by STT
why_track: Language distribution for training data prioritisation

trigger: NLU extracts destination + at least one date entity with confidence >= 0.80
properties: destination_iata:string, origin_iata:string|null, travel_date:date, time_preference:enum[morning|afternoon|evening|any|null], nlu_confidence_score:float, retry_count:integer, slot_fill_turns:integer, utterance_raw_hash:string

trigger: NLU fails to extract required slots after max retries
why_track: NLU failure analysis → training data improvement loop

trigger: Travel API call fires after slots confirmed
Travel API returns results (success or empty)
properties: search_id:string, results_count:integer, api_latency_ms:integer, cache_used:boolean, min_fare:integer|null, max_fare:integer|null, direct_flights_count:integer, connecting_flights_count:integer

trigger: Travel API returns error or times out
Agent reads 2 flight options to merchant
properties: flight_1_id:string, flight_1_airline:string, flight_1_dep_time:string, flight_1_price:integer, flight_2_id:string|null, flight_2_airline:string|null, flight_2_dep_time:string|null, flight_2_price:integer|null, presentation_method:enum[voice|wa_card|both], time_to_present_from_search_ms:integer

trigger: Merchant chooses a specific flight option
properties: selected_flight_id:string, selected_flight_airline:string, selected_flight_price:integer, selection_method:enum[voice|wa_tap], time_to_decide_seconds:integer, selected_option_rank:enum[1|2], price_changed_since_search:boolean, price_delta_inr:integer|null
why_track: Decision speed + option ranking quality validation

trigger: Agent offers credit/wallet payment choice
Merchant chooses credit or wallet
properties: selected_method:enum[credit|wallet], selection_method:enum[voice|wa_tap], credit_available_at_selection:integer, wallet_balance_at_selection:integer, flight_price:integer, was_pre_selected_overridden:boolean
why_track: NORTH STAR enabler — credit attachment rate

trigger: Merchant gives verbal or tap confirmation
Booking API call fires with idempotency key
properties: booking_ref:string, idempotency_key:string, flight_id:string, payment_method:enum[credit|wallet], amount:integer, merchant_id:string

trigger: Booking confirmed by airline + payment successful
properties: booking_id:string, pnr:string, airline:string, origin_iata:string, destination_iata:string, travel_date:date, departure_time:string, fare_inr:integer, payment_method:enum[credit|wallet], credit_charged:integer|null, wallet_charged:integer|null, remaining_credit:integer|null, total_call_duration_seconds:integer, stage_durations_json:string

trigger: Booking API returns error after confirmation
Credit or wallet payment rejected
GSTN API returns ACTIVE status for merchant GSTIN
GST invoice PDF successfully created
properties: invoice_id:string, booking_id:string, merchant_id:string, gstin_last4:string, business_name:string, base_fare:integer, cgst:integer, sgst:integer, total:integer, hsn_code:string, generation_time_ms:integer

trigger: Invoice PDF successfully delivered to merchant WhatsApp
E-ticket PDF delivered to merchant WhatsApp
Post-call WA summary card sent to merchant
Call session terminates (any reason)
Merchant completes post-booking NPS survey
properties: booking_id:string, merchant_id:string, nps_score:integer, nps_category:enum[detractor|passive|promoter], feedback_text_hash:string|null, survey_channel:enum[wa|sms], time_to_submit_minutes:integer

trigger: System switches from voice to WhatsApp or SMS input
why_track: Fallback rate monitoring — AI performance signal

trigger: Call transferred to human agent queue
why_track: Handoff rate + reason analysis → training data

trigger: Human agent resolves the escalated call
Merchant cancels booking post-confirmation
Outbound call placed to merchant based on trigger
Result of outbound call attempt
why_track: Proactive conversion rate by trigger type
